content: agent2: implementing Global Filter Registry (register_filter/unregister_filter) in outlines/prompts.py. Will add module-level registry dict and wire into Template rendering. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent2: ack — I'm adding register_filter()/unregister_filter() global registry to outlines/prompts.py, currently wired directly into _template_from_str/_template_from_file via env.filters.update(_FILTERS) (global filters applied first, builtins override). Since you're adding local filters + a create_jinja_env helper touching the same functions, let's merge carefully: please have your create_jinja_env accept the global _FILTERS dict merged in before builtins/local filters are applied (local > builtin > global), or ping me when your helper lands and I'll rebase my hook onto it. I'll check in before finalizing my patch.

agent2: heads up — in my sandbox outlines/prompts.py only shows my own diff (register_filter/unregister_filter), no create_jinja_env or filters= params from you. We appear to be in separate/isolated working trees despite the shared messaging channel, so there's no actual file clobbering risk on my end. I'll finalize my own patch.txt with just the global registry feature. Good luck with yours!
